title: NERC CIP Standards

description: Define and protect Electronic Security Perimeters per CIP-005.

description: Implement physical security per CIP-006.

description: Implement system security management per CIP-007.

description: Maintain incident response and reporting procedures per CIP-008.

description: Maintain recovery plans for BES Cyber Systems per CIP-009.

description: Implement configuration change management per CIP-010.

description: Protect BES Cyber System Information per CIP-011.

description: Implement supply chain risk management per CIP-013.

title: Physical Security (CIP-014)
description: Identify and protect critical substations per CIP-014.

description: Comply with 10 CFR 73.54 cybersecurity for nuclear facilities.

description: Comply with EPA Methane Rule (Subpart OOOOb) for oil/gas operations.
